description: In these months alone, minus 10% of Russian oil refining. It is also important to note that Russian oil companies are forced to stop wells. This is even more significant. The nature of Russian oil production is such that they are most uncomfortable with it. Besides losing money, of course. In order to resume production at the wells, Russia needs to do much more than many other oil countries that are shutting down...
description_en: In these months alone, minus 10% of Russian oil refining. It is also important to note that Russian oil companies are forced to stop wells. This is even more significant. The nature of Russian oil production is such that they are most uncomfortable with it. Besides losing money, of course. In order to resume production at the wells, Russia needs to do much more than many other oil countries that are shutting down...
description_uk: Тільки цими місяцями мінус 10% російської нафтопереробки. Важливо також відзначити, що російські нафтові компанії змушені зупиняти свердловини. Це ще більш суттєво. Природа російського нафтовидобутку така, що їм саме це найбільш неприємно. Звісно, крім втрати грошей. Щоб відновити видобуток на свердловинах, Росії треба зробити значно більше, ніж багатьом іншим нафтовим країнам, які глушать...

description: May 18 marks the 82nd anniversary of the forced deportation of the Crimean Tatars — a people indigenous to Crimea and officially recognized as one of Ukraine’s indigenous peoples — by the Soviet regime. The Soviet authorities falsely accused the entire Crimean Tatar population of collaborating with Nazi Germany during the two-year occupation of Crimea in World War II. Up to 200,000 Crimean Tatars...

description: Today we remember and honor the memory of all the victims of one of the most brutal crimes of the Soviet government - the deportation of the Crimean Tatar people. Deportation, which became an act of obvious genocide against the Crimean Tatar people. The year 1944 will forever be in history as an attempt to destroy the people - when both children and adults were thrown out of their homes and sent to a foreign land. A large part of the people died in...
description_en: Today we remember and honor the memory of all the victims of one of the most brutal crimes of the Soviet government - the deportation of the Crimean Tatar people. Deportation, which became an act of obvious genocide against the Crimean Tatar people. The year 1944 will forever be in history as an attempt to destroy the people - when both children and adults were thrown out of their homes and sent to a foreign land. A large part of the people died in...
description_uk: Сьогодні ми згадуємо і вшановуємо памʼять усіх жертв одного з найбільш жорстоких злочинів радянської влади – депортації Кримськотатарського народу. Депортації, яка стала актом очевидного геноциду проти Кримськотатарського народу. 1944 рік назавжди буде в історії як спроба знищити народ – коли і малих, і дорослих викинули з рідного дому та відправили в чужий край. title: Kyiv: 22 missiles + 524 drones intercepted
title_en: Kyiv: 22 missiles + 524 drones intercepted
description: At least 2 killed, 49 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 524 drones and 22 missiles, including 14 ballistic missiles, Ukraine's Air Force said. Of them, 503 drones and 4 missiles were shot down. Direct hits by 18 missiles and 16 drones were recorded at 34 locations.
description_en: At least 2 killed, 49 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 524 drones and 22 missiles, including 14 ballistic missiles, Ukraine's Air Force said. Of them, 503 drones and 4 missiles were shot down. Direct hits by 18 missiles and 16 drones were recorded at 34 locations.
description_uk: At least 2 killed, 49 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day. Russia launched 524 drones and 22 missiles, including 14 ballistic missiles, Ukraine's Air Force said. Of them, 503 drones and 4 missiles were shot down. Direct hits by 18 missiles and 16 drones were recorded at 34 locations.

description: May 18 is the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of the Genocide of the Crimean Tatar People 82 years ago, at 3 o'clock in the morning on May 18, 1944, soldiers and operatives of the NKVD broke into the houses of the Crimean Tatars. While the men were fighting at the front, women, children and the elderly were forced out of their homes, giving the assembly only a few minutes. People were herded into freight cars and taken thousands of kilometers from the Motherland - to...

While the men were fighting at the front, women, children and the elderly were forced out of their homes, giving the assembly only a few minutes. description_uk: 18 травня – День пам'яті жертв геноциду кримськотатарського народу 82 роки тому, о 3 годині ранку 18 травня 1944 року, в будинки кримських татар увірвалися солдати та оперативники НКВС. Поки чоловіки воювали на фронті, жінок, дітей та літніх людей насильно вигнали з домівок, давши на збори лічені хвилини. Людей загнали у товарні вагони і відвезли за тисячі кілометрів від Батьківщини – до...

Odeshchyna, Chernihiv Oblast, and Zaporizhzhia were also attacked. ❗️ A total of 546 devices were recorded by the radio engineering troops of the Air Force...

title: Dnipro: 18 injured
title_en: Dnipro: 18 injured
description: Update: Russian drones, missiles strike residential buildings in multiple Ukrainian regions, injuring at least 20. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine has risen to 20, including 18 injured victims stemming from an attack on a residential building in Dnipro, officials reported.
description_en: Update: Russian drones, missiles strike residential buildings in multiple Ukrainian regions, injuring at least 20. The number of injured victims in Russia's overnight attack on Ukraine has risen to 20, including 18 injured victims stemming from an attack on a residential building in Dnipro, officials reported.

title: Dnipro: Attack attack on residential area
title_en: Dnipro: Attack attack on residential area
description: Update: Russian attack on central, southern Ukraine injures at least 12. The number of injured victims in an overnight Russian attack on Dnipro has risen to nine people, including a child, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha reported. Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.
description_en: Update: Russian attack on central, southern Ukraine injures at least 12. The number of injured victims in an overnight Russian attack on Dnipro has risen to nine people, including a child, Dnipropetrovsk Oblast Governor Oleksandr Hanzha reported. Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.

Three others were also injured in Odesa in an attack on a residential building overnight.

Україна рішуче засуджує будь-які атаки, що ставлять під загрозу безпеку ядерних об’єктів. Україна вже понад чотири роки зазнає цілеспрямованих російських ударів по енергетичній...

title: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we...
title_en: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we...
title_uk: У День пам'яті жертв політичних репресій ми...
description: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we honor the millions of people destroyed by the Soviet totalitarian regime. Mass arrests, torture, extrajudicial executions, deportations and politically motivated persecution have become tragedies for generations of Ukrainians. Bykivnia, Demyaniv Laz, Pyatikhatky, Rutchenkove Pole and dozens of other places throughout Ukraine and outside our country are evidence of tragedies,...
description_en: On the Day of Remembrance of the Victims of Political Repression, we honor the millions of people destroyed by the Soviet totalitarian regime. Mass arrests, torture, extrajudicial executions, deportations and politically motivated persecution have become tragedies for generations of Ukrainians. Bykivnia, Demyaniv Laz, Pyatikhatky, Rutchenkove Pole and dozens of other places throughout Ukraine and outside our country are evidence of tragedies,...
description_uk: У День пам’яті жертв політичних репресій ми вшановуємо мільйони людей, знищених радянським тоталітарним режимом. Масові арешти, катування, розстріли без суду, депортації та переслідування за політичними мотивами стали трагедіями для поколінь українців. Биківня, Дем’янів Лаз, П’ятихатки, Рутченкове поле та десятки інших місць по всій Україні та за межами нашої держави є свідченнями трагедій,...
